subject: ENG
question: $\textbf{Answers Next 5 Questions based on the passage below:}$ $\\$ Electric vehicles (EVs) are becoming increasingly popular as an alternative to traditional gasoline-powered cars. They run on electricity stored in batteries and produce no direct tailpipe emissions, making them environmentally friendly when charged with renewable energy sources. However, their overall carbon footprint can be higher if electricity is generated primarily from fossil fuels like coal. Governments around the world are encouraging the use of EVs by providing subsidies and building charging infrastructure. The production of EV batteries involves resource extraction, such as mining lithium and other minerals, which can have significant environmental impacts. At the end of their lifecycle, battery disposal and recycling also pose challenges. Despite their advantages, obstacles to widespread adoption include limited driving range, long charging times, high initial costs, and concerns over battery production and end-of-life management. Lack of consumer interest due to these factors remains a key barrier. $\\$ The passage implies that EVs are most environmentally beneficial when:
option1: Electricity is generated from renewable sources
option3: Electricity is imported from other countries
option4: Electricity is generated from nuclear power
